message:
fix(sync): Resolve deadlock in Notify poll Waiting state

The Notified::poll function was calling cleanup() while still holding
the waiters mutex lock. Since cleanup() also tries to acquire the same
lock, this caused a deadlock with non-reentrant StdMutex.

Restructured the Waiting state handler to:
1. Check notification status while holding lock
2. Update waker if not notified
3. Release lock before calling cleanup()

This fixes the hanging test: sync::notify::tests::notify_one_wakes_waiter

Closes: bd-1cww

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
